Category

Open Houses

Everything you need to run an open house that generates real leads — from prep to follow-up.

LFG + PLACE  ·  Scripts & Dialogues
Open House | At the Open House Script

Script 1

“Are you out shopping for a home today, or do you happen to live in the neighborhood?”

They Are a Neighbor:

“My name is ______. What was your name? And your last name?

“What street do you live on? How do you like the neighborhood?”

“You may be surprised at the value of your home on TODAY’s Market, would it be of value to you to know whether or not your value has increased??”

“Most of your neighbors have asked to be included in receiving an EXCLUSIVE neighborhood report emailed on a monthly basis, would you like to be included in that list??”

“Undoubtedly, you already know that keeping in touch with what’s happening to values in your neighborhood is one of the SMARTEST things you can do, right?”

They Are Out Shopping:

“Great! How have you been getting into homes?

“Would it be of value to you to have a list of all available homes for sale in the neighborhood, including the addresses so you can drive by?”

“Would it be of value to you to have a list of the other open houses in the area this weekend?”

“Would it be valuable to you if I put together a private tour in one afternoon of all the homes that interest you, whether they are open on the weekend or not?”

Script 2

First, greet and welcome prospects/attendees.

“How did you happen to find us today?”

My agent sent me

“Great! Who is your agent?”

I don’t know his or her name

“What prompted you to stop by today?”

“Ideally, how soon do you want to be in your new home?”

“What’s important to you about that?”

OR ask questions to get in rapport:

“This is a newly built modern. Are you specifically looking for a modern home or are you open to other styles?”

“This home happens to be in the Mar Vista school district. Are you specifically interested in Mar Vista schools or are you open to other school districts or is that even something that’s important to you?”

Once you get motivation, ask for the appointment (remember, always be asking for the appointment!)!

“I would love to apply for the job of helping you find the right home. When is a good time for us to meet? How about _________, _________ at _________ or _________, _________ at _________?”

Category

Listing Resources

How we prepare, present, and win the listing — step by step.

LFG + PLACE  ·  Scripts & Dialogues
5-5-5 Pricing Script

▶ Video Overview of 5-5-5

Why 5-5-5?

We have found that by showing the seller the same data and material that we are using to determine where a property should be priced, they will come to the same pricing conclusion that we do. We call this strategy the 5-5-5 pricing method.

5-5-5 Script:

Let’s take a look at the 5-5-5 pricing strategy.

The 5-5-5 is the most accurate way to price a property. The 5-5-5 takes 5 active properties that are comparable to your own, 5 pending properties that are comparable to your own, and 5 sold properties. What you’ll notice as we go through this 5-5-5 is that these homes are going to create a price bracket.

The active ones represent your competition. What can a buyer go out and purchase instead of your home? You want to be the best looking and the best priced home on the market to be the next one the market absorbs.

The pending properties are the ones that have accepted offers. While we don’t know what these properties will end up selling for, we do know at what price they were marketed to attract an offer, and today average homes sell within ____% of asking price.

The sold properties are the best representation of what the current market is bearing and what your property will sell for in the end.

LFG + PLACE  ·  Printable Form
Seller Information Lead Sheet

The intake sheet to have in hand on every seller call. It walks you through the full conversation in order — contact info, motivation ("Why are you selling? Where are you moving to?"), timeline, ownership and pricing expectations, a complete property description, what they're looking for in a real estate team, and the appointment ask — then finishes with lead tracking: status, time frame, source, Brivity entry, and referral details.

↓ Download & Print the Sheet

Workshop · August 5, 2026

AI for Real Estate
Agents: Hands-On

August 5, 2026  ·  12:00 – 4:00 PM
Venture X  ·  Frederick, MD
Free  ·  Limited Seats
Coming Soon
About This Workshop

Stop Talking About AI.
Start Using It.

You've heard the buzz. You've seen the headlines. But most agents still aren't using AI in any meaningful way in their day-to-day business — and that gap is only getting wider.

This is a hands-on workshop. Bring your laptop. We're not here to talk theory — we're here to build real workflows you can walk out the door with and use the same afternoon. From writing listing descriptions in seconds to automating follow-up, you'll leave with tools that actually save you time and help you close more deals.

Whether you've never touched an AI tool or you've dabbled and want to go deeper, this session meets you where you are.

What You'll Learn

Four Hours. Real Skills.

✍️
Listing Descriptions & Marketing Copy

Generate compelling property descriptions, social captions, and email blasts in under a minute.

📱
Lead Follow-Up Automation

Build AI-assisted follow-up sequences that sound like you — not a robot — and never let a lead go cold.

📊
Market Analysis & CMAs

Use AI to pull insights, summarize data, and present market conditions to clients with confidence.

🎥
Video & Content Creation

Scripts, Shorts, and social content — faster than you thought possible without sacrificing your voice.

🤝
Client Communication

Draft offers, negotiate updates, and keep clients informed with AI-polished messaging every step of the way.

⚙️
Building Your AI Workflow

Leave with a personalized stack of tools and a repeatable daily workflow you can actually stick to.

Workshop · August 26, 2026

Build a Business
Worth Owning

August 26, 2026  ·  9:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Venture X  ·  Frederick, MD
Free  ·  Limited Seats
Reserve Your Seat →
About This Workshop

The Agent Growth Workshop: Building a Predictable 25+ Transaction Business

Most agents are working harder than they should be for the results they're getting. The problem isn't effort — it's the absence of a real system. Lead generation that's inconsistent. Follow-up that falls through the cracks. A calendar that's always full but never feels productive.

Most agents don't fail because they lack talent. They fail because they lack a clear system. This workshop is designed specifically for agents closing fewer than 20 transactions per year who want to create a more predictable, profitable, and sustainable real estate business.

During our time together, we'll break down the exact fundamentals top-producing agents use to consistently generate business, convert opportunities, and build momentum year after year.

Four hours. Practical strategies. No fluff. You'll leave with a clear picture of exactly what needs to change — and the tools to start changing it Monday morning.

What You'll Learn

What We're Covering

🎯
Lead Generation

Build a consistent, repeatable pipeline using the strategies that actually work in today's market — not the tactics that just sound good.

⚙️
Systems & Structure

Stop running your business from memory. We'll show you the systems and daily structure that create predictable results.

🗂️
Database & CRM

Your database is your business. Learn how to organize, work, and grow it so the people you already know become your most reliable source of deals.

🛠️
Tools & Technology

Cut through the noise and focus on the tools that actually move the needle — without overcomplicating your business.

📈
Leverage & Scaling

Identify where your time is being wasted and how to get more out of every hour — whether you want to grow a team or run lean.

✅
Accountability & Execution

Strategy without execution is just theory. We'll build the habits and accountability frameworks that keep you on track week after week.

Who Should Attend

This Is for You If...

✓
You closed under 19 deals last year and know you're capable of more — you just haven't found the right system yet.
✓
You're tired of inconsistency — some months are great, some are slow, and you can't figure out why.
✓
You want to increase your income without increasing your hours — and you're willing to rethink how you work to get there.
✓
You're open to new ideas and ready to be in a room with other serious agents who share the same goals.
Your Hosts

Drew co-leads Live Frederick Group with a focus on lead generation and prospecting. His coaching centers on the daily habits and scripts that consistently put new opportunities on your calendar — and keep them coming regardless of the market.

Free Workshop · November 11, 2026

Build the Year
Before It Happens

A Goal-Setting Workshop for Agents Ready to Stop Reacting and Start Building.

November 11, 2026  ·  Wednesday
Venture X  ·  Frederick, MD
Free  ·  Limited Seats
Registration Coming Soon
About This Workshop

The Year Doesn't Build Itself

Most agents close out the year, take a breath, and then stumble into the next one doing the same things. No clear targets. No written plan. No way to know if they're on track until it's too late to course-correct.

This workshop is built for agents doing 0–19 deals a year who are ready to change that. We're going to walk through the exact goal-setting process that top producers use — not the fluffy vision-board version, but the specific, trackable, reverse-engineered kind that tells you exactly what you need to do every week to hit your number.

You'll leave with a written business plan for 2027, a daily and weekly activity target, and the clarity to actually execute it.

What You'll Learn

What We're Covering

🎯
Setting Goals That Actually Stick

The difference between a wish and a goal is a plan. We'll show you how to set targets that are specific, measurable, and tied to real activity.

🔢
Reverse-Engineering Your Number

Start with your income goal and work backwards — how many closings, how many appointments, how many conversations do you need every single week?

📅
Building Your 2027 Business Plan

You'll build it in the room, not just think about it. Leave with a written plan that has your targets, your lead sources, and your weekly activity numbers.

⏱️
Time Blocking for Execution

A plan without a schedule is just hope. We'll time-block your week so your goals have protected time on the calendar before anything else.

📊
Tracking What Matters

The numbers that tell you if you're on track — and how to review them weekly so you can adjust before small gaps become big problems.

🧠
Mindset & Commitment

Most plans fail because of psychology, not strategy. We'll cover how to stay accountable to your goals when motivation fades — which it always does.

Who Should Attend

This Is for You If...

✓
You're closing fewer than 20 deals a year and you're ready to change that — not someday, but next year.
✓
You've never had a written business plan — or had one and never looked at it after January.
✓
You want to know exactly what to do each week to hit your number, instead of guessing.
✓
You want to walk out of a room with a real plan in your hands — not just ideas in your head.

Elite Agent Mastermind · September 16, 2026

Invitation Only

September 16, 2026  ·  Wednesday
Frederick, MD
25+ Transactions/Yr  ·  By Invitation Only
Invitations Sent Directly — No Public Signup
About This Mastermind

A Room for Operators, Not Spectators

The Elite Agent Mastermind is a closed-door session built exclusively for agents already closing 25 or more transactions a year. This isn't a workshop for agents trying to get started — it's a room for operators comparing notes on what's actually working at a high level: scaling a team, protecting margin, leverage, and the next-level systems that separate a good year from a great one.

Because the conversation only works with the right people in the room, attendance is by invitation only. There is no public registration for this event. If you qualify and haven't heard from us, reach out directly to Cory or Drew.

Special Guest

Featuring Brian Gubernick

Guest Speaker

Brian Gubernick

20+ Year Real Estate Veteran · Team Leader · Coach · Podcast Host

Brian Gubernick has worn just about every hat in this business — agent, team leader, brokerage partner, investor, and entrepreneur. He built Homehelper Consultants into one of the top 250 producing teams in the country (as ranked by RealTrends/Wall Street Journal), expanded it across multiple markets, and has personally coached thousands of sales professionals on business growth, leadership, and performance.

These days, Brian channels that experience into No Days Off — a daily podcast built around the idea that every day is an opportunity to get better in business, relationships, and life. He also co-founded Metrix Masterminds, where he's spent nearly a decade hosting world-class speakers and facilitating high-level conversations among top producers.

At this mastermind, Brian will be diving into Benjamin Hardy's The Science of Scaling — breaking down what those frameworks actually mean for how serious agents and team leaders build, grow, and operate at a higher level.

Brian brings a rare combination: serious production credentials and a genuine passion for elevating the people around him. We're excited to have him in the room.

Operating Systems at Scale

The systems that hold up at 25+ deals a year look different than the ones that got you to 10. We'll break down what changes.

🎯
Next-Level Lead Generation

Moving beyond the basics into the advanced strategies top producers use to stay full without burning out.

🤝
Peer Accountability

A room of agents at your level, holding each other to a higher standard — not theory, real numbers and real talk.

🔑
What's Actually Working Now

Real-time insight on what's converting in today's market from agents actively closing at a high level.

Who Should Attend

Free Coaching Consultation

We'll Buy You 30 Minutes With a Coach Who's Built What You're Trying to Build

Cory and Drew lead Live Frederick Group — a PLACE team at Keller Williams. Cory built his side of the business on the database: systems and follow-up that turn the people you already know into your most reliable source of deals. Drew built his on prospecting: the daily habits and scripts that keep new opportunities coming, no matter the market.

On this call, we'll talk through where your business is today, what's getting in the way, and which approach — database, prospecting, or a mix — fits where you're trying to go. No pitch, no pressure. Just a real conversation with someone who's done it.

✓ A clear-eyed look at what's working and what isn't in your current business
✓ A recommendation on whether database, prospecting, or both should be your next focus
✓ Real systems and scripts you can start using immediately — whether or not you continue with coaching

Request Your 30-Minute Session

Tell us a bit about you and we'll reach out to get something on the calendar.

✓ Thanks! We'll be in touch shortly to schedule your session.

Meet Your Coaches

Two Different Paths to Growth. One Team.

Database & Systems Coach

Cory Wilson

Cory coaches agents on how to build a six-figure business by working their database — turning the people they already know into a consistent, repeatable source of business.

His coaching centers on implementing the systems and processes that make follow-up automatic, so nothing falls through the cracks and your pipeline runs whether or not you're “on” that day.

Lead Generation & Prospecting Coach

Drew Hopley

Drew coaches agents on lead generation and prospecting — the daily habits and scripts that consistently put new opportunities on your calendar.

From door-knocking and calling to building a pipeline that doesn't dry up, Drew's coaching is built for agents who want to take control of their lead flow instead of waiting on it.

Ready to Talk Through Your Business?

It's 30 minutes, it's free, and it's with someone who's actually built what you're trying to build. Fill out the form above and we'll take it from there.
